# Implementation Plan: Add Confirmation Step to Critical Actions

**Branch**: `035-confirm-critical-actions` | **Date**: 2026-03-11 | **Spec**: `/specs/035-confirm-critical-actions/spec.md`
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/035-confirm-critical-actions/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` command.

## Summary

Standardize and harden the existing confirmation infrastructure across all critical/destructive actions in the application. The codebase already has a robust `useConfirmation` hook and `ConfirmationDialog` component with variant support (danger/warning/info), async loading states, focus restoration, and dialog queuing. This feature ensures 100% coverage of critical actions with confirmation prompts, standardizes messaging (titles, descriptions, button labels), closes accessibility gaps (ARIA roles, focus trapping, screen reader announcements), migrates the ad-hoc tool deletion modal to the standard dialog system, and adds double-click/rapid-submission guards to all confirmation flows. All changes are frontend-only — no backend modifications required.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript ~5.9 (frontend), Python 3.13 (backend — no changes)
**Primary Dependencies**: React 19.2, React Router DOM 7.13, TanStack React Query 5.90, Radix UI (slot, tooltip), Tailwind CSS 4.2, CVA 0.7, Lucide React 0.577
**Storage**: N/A (frontend-only changes; no new persistence)
**Testing**: Vitest with happy-dom, `npm run test` in frontend/
**Target Platform**: Modern web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
**Project Type**: Web application (frontend + backend)
**Performance Goals**: Confirmation prompts render in <50ms; no perceptible delay on action trigger
**Constraints**: All prompts must meet WCAG 2.1 AA; no new runtime dependencies
**Scale/Scope**: ~6 modified frontend files, ~0 new files (infrastructure already exists), ~200–400 lines changed

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

| Principle | Status | Evidence |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| I. Specification-First | ✅ PASS | `spec.md` contains 6 prioritized user stories (P1–P3) with independent test criteria and Given-When-Then acceptance scenarios |
| II. Template-Driven | ✅ PASS | All artifacts follow canonical templates from `.specify/templates/` |
| III. Agent-Orchestrated | ✅ PASS | Plan phase produces plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, contracts/, quickstart.md — clear handoff to tasks phase |
| IV. Test Optionality | ✅ PASS | Tests are not mandated by spec; existing test infrastructure covers the confirmation components. Tests may be added for new behavior but are not required |
| V. Simplicity and DRY | ✅ PASS | Feature extends existing `useConfirmation` + `ConfirmationDialog` infrastructure rather than creating parallel systems. The ad-hoc tool deletion modal will be migrated to reuse the standard dialog |

**Pre-Phase 0 Gate**: ✅ PASS — No violations. Proceeding to research.

| Principle | Status | Evidence |

| IV. Test Optionality | ✅ PASS | Tests not mandated; existing test coverage for confirmation components is sufficient. Tests may be added during implementation but are not required |
| V. Simplicity and DRY | ✅ PASS | Design extends existing infrastructure (no new files created). Ad-hoc tool modal migrated to reuse standard dialog. No premature abstractions introduced |

**Post-Phase 1 Gate**: ✅ PASS — No violations. Ready for `/speckit.tasks`.

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/035-confirm-critical-actions/
├── plan.md              # This file
├── research.md          # Phase 0 output
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 output
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 output
├── contracts/           # Phase 1 output
│   ├── components.md    # Component contracts
│   └── hooks.md         # Hook/behavior contracts
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 output (NOT created by /speckit.plan)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
frontend/
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── ui/
│   │   │   └── confirmation-dialog.tsx       # MODIFIED — accessibility hardening, ARIA roles
│   │   ├── tools/
│   │   │   └── ToolsPanel.tsx                # MODIFIED — migrate ad-hoc modal to ConfirmationDialog
│   │   ├── pipeline/
│   │   │   └── UnsavedChangesDialog.tsx      # MODIFIED — add focus restoration on close
│   │   └── board/
│   │       └── CleanUpConfirmModal.tsx        # MODIFIED — accessibility alignment
│   ├── hooks/
│   │   └── useConfirmation.tsx               # MODIFIED — queuing robustness, prevent dismiss during loading
│   └── pages/
│       └── AgentsPipelinePage.tsx            # MODIFIED — add confirmation before pipeline deletion
└── tests/                                    # Tests updated as needed for modified components
```

**Structure Decision**: Web application structure (frontend + backend). All changes are confined to `frontend/src/` — specifically the existing confirmation infrastructure (`hooks/useConfirmation.tsx`, `components/ui/confirmation-dialog.tsx`) and the consumer components that trigger critical actions. No new files are created; the existing infrastructure is extended and standardized.
